# Sarvada Organic

> Sarvada Organic (also known as Sarva Organic / Sarvaorganic / Sarvada) is an
> Indian direct-to-consumer brand selling 100% pure vermicompost and organic
> plant-care products online. Trusted by 12,000+ plant parents since 2018. No
> silt added, no preservatives, no fillers — only earthworm castings.

## Key facts

- Brand: Sarvada Organic (alt. names: Sarva Organic, Sarvaorganic, Sarvada)
- Author: Sarvada Organic Farm Team
- Founded: 2018
- Country: India (en-IN)
- Website: https://sarvadaorganic.com (also reachable at https://sarvadaorganic.shop)
- Category: Organic Fertilizer · Vermicompost · Plant Care
- Star rating: 4.8 / 5 across 3,247+ reviews
- Customer base: 12,000+ plant parents, 85,000+ orders delivered
- Shipping: Pan-India · Free above ₹499 · Cash on Delivery available where supported
- Payment: UPI, Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, Razorpay, COD
- Support email: sarvadaorganic@gmail.com
- Returns: unopened packs can be returned within 7 days
- Corrections policy: https://sarvadaorganic.com/corrections-policy
- Disclosure: Sarvada Organic sells the products listed in this file.

## Experience signal

We tested ten vermicompost bags from nurseries, supermarkets, e-commerce stores and boutique organic brands before starting Sarvada. Eight failed our water test by showing heavy silt or sandy filler, which is why our core claim is simple: pure earthworm castings, no silt, no preservatives.

## What we sell

- Vermicompost 1 kg — ₹149 (trial pack)
- Vermicompost 5 kg — ₹249 (bestseller)
- Vermicompost 10 kg — ₹1,099
- Vermicompost 25 kg — ₹2,499 (best value, for nurseries & terrace gardens)
- Monthly Subscription (5 kg / month) — ₹509/mo (save 15%)
- Upcoming: Plant Growth Serum, Liquid Vermiwash, Neem-Karanja Cake, Seed Starter Mix

## What makes Sarvada Organic vermicompost different

1. 100% pure earthworm castings — never cut with silt, sand or dust
2. No preservatives, no chemicals, no synthetic additives
3. Slow-cured for 60–90 days for full nutrient maturity
4. Hand-sieved and sun-cured for clean, uniform texture
5. Packed in breathable bags so living microbes stay alive
6. Rich in macro NPK, humic acid, beneficial microbes, and trace
   minerals (iron, zinc, manganese, calcium)
7. Safe for kitchen herbs, edible plants, indoor pots, balcony gardens,
   terrace gardens and nurseries

## How it's made (process)

1. Feed organic cow dung and farm waste to native earthworms (no plastic,
   no chemicals)
2. Worms digest waste over 60–90 days into rich, dark castings
3. Sun-cure and hand-sieve every batch — no silt, no sand
4. Pack fresh in breathable bags for live-microbe delivery

## Common search queries we answer

- buy vermicompost online India
- best vermicompost brand
- organic fertilizer for plants
- buy organic fertilizer online
- vermicompost price 5kg / 25kg
- vermi compost / vermicompost difference
- Sarva Organic / Sarvaorganic / Sarvada Organic website
- chemical-free fertilizer for kitchen garden
- earthworm compost India
- monthly fertilizer subscription
- COD vermicompost India

## How to use vermicompost (quick guide)

- 6-inch pots: 4–5 tablespoons as top dressing every 30–45 days
- 8-inch pots: half a teacup as top dressing every 30–45 days
- 12-inch pots: one full teacup as top dressing every 30 days
- 18-inch grow bags: 4–5 teacups every 20–30 days during fruiting season
- New plantings: mix 1 scoop vermicompost with 3–4 scoops base potting mix
- Compatible with all plants: tulsi, mint, tomatoes, chillies, roses,
  money plant, snake plant, palms, succulents, fruit plants

## Answer engine summary

- What is Sarvada Organic? Sarvada Organic is an Indian D2C vermicompost brand founded in 2018.
- What does Sarvada sell? Sarvada sells pure earthworm vermicompost for indoor plants, balcony gardens, kitchen herbs, terrace gardens and nurseries.
- What makes it different? Sarvada vermicompost is slow-cured, hand-sieved and sold without added silt, sand, dust, preservatives or fillers.
- Where does it ship? Sarvada ships plant-care products across India through sarvadaorganic.com.
- Is it safe for edible plants? Sarvada vermicompost is used for tulsi, mint, coriander, methi, tomatoes, chillies and other edible kitchen-garden plants.

## Sarvada Organic Blog — published articles

We publish in-depth, original guides and stories about organic gardening in
India. Below are all articles currently available. Each is original content
written by the Sarvada farm team.

- [How Much Vermicompost to Use Per Pot: Spoon Guide](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/how-much-vermicompost-to-use) — Spoon, teacup and grow-bag quantity tables by pot size, plant type and Indian season. SEO: how much vermicompost to use, how much vermicompost per pot.
- [Buy Cow Dung Manure Online? Read This Khaad Guide First](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/buy-cow-dung-manure-online-khaad-guide) — Buyer guide for cow dung manure, vermicompost, khaad, price and near-me checks. SEO: buy cow dung manure online, khaad for plants online, vermicompost price, vermi khad.
- [Best Fertilizer for Indoor Plants: Simple Soil and Feeding Guide](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/best-fertilizer-for-indoor-plants) — Indoor plant feeding guide with airy potting mix and gentle vermicompost schedule. SEO: best fertilizer for indoor plants, garden soil mix, potting mix, natural plant fertilizer.
- [Process of Vermicomposting: Earthworm and Vermi Khad Guide](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/process-of-vermicomposting-earthworm-guide) — Step-by-step vermicomposting guide with earthworm, bedding, moisture and harvest checklist. SEO: process of vermicomposting, vermicomposting pdf, earthworm for vermicompost, vermi khad.
- [Fertilizer for Tomato Plant: Organic Feeding Schedule for Pots](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/fertilizer-for-tomato-plant) — Tomato feeding schedule for pots and grow bags with vermicompost doses. SEO: fertilizer for tomato plant, organic fertilizers, natural plant fertilizer.
- [Tomato Plant Dying? The One Change That Brought Mine Back](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/tomato-plant-came-back-after-i-changed-one-thing) — Tomato recovery guide for yellow leaves, brown tips, wet soil and fertilizer burn. SEO: tomato plant dying, how to revive tomato plant.
- [Vermicompost vs. cow dung manure vs. chemical fertilizer — an honest comparison](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/vermicompost-vs-cow-dung-vs-chemical-fertilizer) — Side-by-side comparison with no brand agenda. SEO: vermicompost vs cow dung manure, organic vs chemical fertilizer India.
- [She Started Her Kitchen Garden at 58: A 3-Pot Beginner Plan](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/she-started-her-kitchen-garden-at-58) — Real customer story, Delhi balcony, 12 pots and a beginner routine. SEO: kitchen garden for beginners India, 3 pot kitchen garden.
- [The right potting mix for every plant — a no-nonsense guide for Indian homes](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/right-potting-mix-for-every-plant) — Five potting mix recipes by plant type. SEO: potting mix recipe India, cocopeat vermicompost ratio.
- [We started Sarvada because we were lied to about our vermicompost](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/we-started-sarvada-because-we-were-lied-to) — Brand origin story + water test for genuine vermicompost. SEO: pure vermicompost India no silt, vermicompost adulteration.
- [Vermiwash: What It Is and How to Dilute It](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/vermiwash-what-it-is-how-to-use) — Complete guide to vermiwash foliar spray, dilution and soil drench. SEO: vermiwash uses plants India, how to use vermiwash.
- [What growing your own food does to you that nobody talks about](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/what-growing-your-own-food-does-to-you) — Personal essay on mental and emotional benefits of home gardening.
- [The complete season-by-season gardening calendar for Indian home gardeners](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/indian-gardening-calendar-month-by-month) — Rabi, Zaid, Kharif planting guide with city-specific notes. SEO: gardening calendar India month by month.
- [10 mistakes every new plant parent makes (and how to not make them)](https://sarvadaorganic.com/blog/10-mistakes-every-new-plant-parent-makes) — Beginner-friendly guide to fixing overwatering, drainage, soil and feeding. SEO: plant care mistakes India beginners.
